title: Mithril
description: This is a small mod that adds mithril tools and weapons which each have special abilities such as the helmet granting the user night vision.
body:
This mod adds a new material known as mithril that is found from y-level 20 to y-level -64.

It adds mithril tools and armor which have stats that are in between diamond and netherite.However, the durability is much higher at 3000.

The tools and armor also have special functions, some of which include:
- A chance for extra damage when hitting a mob
- Night vision when wearing the mithril helmet
- Connected logs breaking when using the mithril axe

This mod is intended to bridge the gap between diamond and netherite, while also adding unique features instead of just having a plain stat increase.

I’m open to suggestions or requests — feel free to reach out if you have a mod idea.

If you notice any bugs please contact me at italianchef123@hotmail.com or on discord at italianchef123
